# Carrgo Freight Solutions
> Trusted UK freight forwarding company handling sea freight (FCL & LCL), air cargo, European road haulage, China-UK rail freight, and customs clearance. All-inclusive door-to-door shipping quotes for UK importers.

## Services
- [Sea Freight](https://carrgo.netlify.app/services/sea-freight): FCL and LCL container shipping from China, India, USA, and Europe to Felixstowe, Southampton, and London Gateway. All-inclusive ocean freight with UK customs clearance.
- [Air Freight](https://carrgo.netlify.app/services/air-freight): Express and economy air cargo from China, USA, UAE, and Europe to Heathrow, Manchester, and Birmingham. Door-to-door delivery in 1-5 days.
- [Road Freight](https://carrgo.netlify.app/services/road-freight): FTL and LTL groupage road freight from Germany, Netherlands, Spain, France, and all EU countries. Daily departures with GPS tracking.
- [Rail Freight China to UK](https://carrgo.netlify.app/services/rail-freight-china-uk): New Silk Road shipping via China-UK rail. Faster than sea (14-20 days), 40% cheaper than air.
- [Customs Clearance](https://carrgo.netlify.app/services/customs-clearance): Authorised customs brokers handling all UK import and export declarations with high first-submission success rate.
- [Door-to-Door Freight](https://carrgo.netlify.app/services/door-to-door): Complete factory-to-warehouse forwarding. One quote, one invoice, zero hassle.
- [Amazon FBA Freight](https://carrgo.netlify.app/services/amazon-fba-freight): FBA prep, labelling, and delivery to UK Amazon fulfilment centres including BHX4, EMA1, LBA1.
- [Warehousing](https://carrgo.netlify.app/services/warehousing): Midlands storage with pick and pack, container devanning, bonded warehouse, and UK-wide distribution.

## Trade Routes
- [China to UK](https://carrgo.netlify.app/routes/china-to-uk): Sea 25-35 days, Air 3-5 days, Rail 14-20 days
- [Germany to UK](https://carrgo.netlify.app/routes/germany-to-uk): Road 2-4 days, Sea 5-8 days, Air 1-2 days
- [Netherlands to UK](https://carrgo.netlify.app/routes/netherlands-to-uk): Road 1-3 days, Sea 3-5 days, Air 1 day
- [India to UK](https://carrgo.netlify.app/routes/india-to-uk): Sea 20-28 days, Air 3-5 days
- [USA to UK](https://carrgo.netlify.app/routes/usa-to-uk): Sea 10-15 days, Air 1-3 days
- [Turkey to UK](https://carrgo.netlify.app/routes/turkey-to-uk): Sea 14-20 days, Road 5-7 days
- [UAE to UK](https://carrgo.netlify.app/routes/uae-to-uk): Sea 18-24 days, Air 2-4 days
- [Spain to UK](https://carrgo.netlify.app/routes/spain-to-uk): Road 4-9 days, Sea 7-12 days

## Resources
- [Port Congestion Tracker](https://carrgo.netlify.app/resources/port-congestion-tracker): Live UK port status for Felixstowe, Southampton, London Gateway
- [Shipping Guides](https://carrgo.netlify.app/resources/shipping-guides): Sea, air, road, and customs shipping guides
- [Container Size Guide](https://carrgo.netlify.app/resources/container-size-guide): 20ft, 40ft, 40ft HC container dimensions and capacity
- [Incoterms Guide](https://carrgo.netlify.app/resources/incoterms-guide): Full guide to EXW, FCA, CPT, CIP, DAP, DPU, DDP, FAS, FOB, CFR, CIF
- [Freight FAQs](https://carrgo.netlify.app/resources/freight-faqs): Answers to common freight forwarding questions
- [Case Studies](https://carrgo.netlify.app/resources/case-studies): Success stories from UK importers
- [Industries](https://carrgo.netlify.app/resources/industries): Freight solutions for furniture, ecommerce, automotive, construction
- [Our Process](https://carrgo.netlify.app/resources/our-process): 5-step freight forwarding process
- [Post-Brexit Customs Guide](https://carrgo.netlify.app/resources/post-brexit-customs-guide): Navigating UK customs after Brexit
